reasoning: The scenario presents two distinct compliance issues: (1) SB-RUNACCT-001 requires running account settlement on either a monthly or quarterly basis (per client choice, on exchange-stipulated dates) — annual settlement is non-compliant; (2) SB-RUNACCT-012 requires settlement intimation to be sent by BOTH SMS (to registered mobile) AND email, including fund transfer details — email-only notification is non-compliant; additionally, SB-RUNACCT-013 requires the retention statement and running account statement to be sent within 5 working days of settlement, and SB-RUNACCT-014 requires the TM to maintain a process for clients to raise disputes within 30 working days. All four obligations are currently valid as of 2026-06-24 under SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD-1/P/CIR/2024/110.

obligations_considered.title: Settle Running Account on Exchange-Stipulated Dates per Client Choice
Send SMS and Email Settlement Intimation with Transfer Details
Send Retention Statement with Running Account Statement Within 5 Working Days
Allow Client 30 Working Days to Raise Disputes on Running Account Statement

findings.gap_summary: The firm settles running accounts once a year, which does not comply with the requirement to settle on a monthly or quarterly basis as chosen by each client on Stock Exchange-stipulated dates.
findings.evidence: We settle client running accounts once a year
findings.recommended_action: Implement a client-level settlement frequency election process (monthly or quarterly) and align settlement execution to Stock Exchange-stipulated dates. Annual settlement is not a permissible frequency under the regulation.

findings.gap_summary: The firm notifies clients by email only, whereas the obligation requires intimation by both SMS to the registered mobile number and by email upon settlement of a running account.
findings.recommended_action: Configure an automated dual-channel dispatch system that sends settlement intimation via both SMS (to the registered mobile number) and email simultaneously, including the required fund transfer details (transaction number and date for electronic transfers, or instrument number and date for physical payments).

args.query: running account settlement frequency client authorization notification intimation email SMS

observation.title: Settle Running Account on Exchange-Stipulated Dates per Client Choice
observation.obligation_text: The Trading Member (TM), after considering the End of the Day (EOD) obligation of funds across all Exchanges, must settle clients' running accounts on either a quarterly or monthly basis (as chosen by each client), on the dates stipulated by the Stock Exchanges.
observation.parent_heading: Settlement of Running Account of Client's Funds lying with Trading Member

observation.title: Send SMS and Email Settlement Intimation with Transfer Details
observation.obligation_text: Once the Trading Member settles a client's running account, it must send an intimation to the client by SMS to the registered mobile number and by email. The intimation must include the fund transfer details: for electronic transfers, the transaction number and date; for physical payment instruments, the instrument number and date.
observation.parent_heading: Settlement of Running Account of Client's Funds lying with Trading Member

observation.title: Send Retention Statement with Running Account Statement Within 5 Working Days
observation.obligation_text: The Trading Member must send the retention statement along with the statement of running accounts to the client, as per existing provisions, within 5 working days of settling the running account.
observation.parent_heading: Settlement of Running Account of Client's Funds lying with Trading Member

observation.title: Allow Client 30 Working Days to Raise Disputes on Running Account Statement
observation.obligation_text: A client must bring any dispute regarding the statement of running account to the notice of the TM within 30 working days from the date of the statement. The TM must maintain a process to receive, log, and address such disputes within this timeframe.
observation.parent_heading: Settlement of Running Account of Client's Funds lying with Trading Member
